item.title: A 19th-Century Pipe from the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a 19th-century pipe, showing how small finds can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A 19th-Century Pipe from the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a 19th-century pipe, showing how small finds can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Perfectly Preserved Vintage Bottle Found
item.description: Nicola White discovers a perfectly preserved vintage bottle on the Thames foreshore, exploring its history and the stories it may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Perfectly Preserved Vintage Bottle Found
media:content.media:description: Nicola White discovers a perfectly preserved vintage bottle on the Thames foreshore, exploring its history and the stories it may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Long Pipe Find on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares one of the longest pipes she has found, revealing how small objects can tell big stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority

media:content.media:title: A Long Pipe Find on the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares one of the longest pipes she has found, revealing how small objects can tell big stories. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority

item.title: A Curious Find in the Thames Mud
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a curious object, showing how even small finds can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Curious Find in the Thames Mud
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a curious object, showing how even small finds can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: London’s Forgotten Treasures Found
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, where small finds can reveal London’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: London’s Forgotten Treasures Found
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, where small finds can reveal London’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Bottle Find on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a bottle find and its tiny occupant. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Bottle Find on the Thames Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a bottle find and its tiny occupant. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Finding Two Coins for My Collection
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and adds two coins to her collection, sharing their history and the stories they may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Finding Two Coins for My Collection
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and adds two coins to her collection, sharing their history and the stories they may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A 2,000-Year-Old Artifact on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and traces a 2,000-year-old artifact back through history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
